name: Build Land
author: Poki
description: Build Land is an idle/management game where you're the master of your own island paradise! Start from scratch and watch your island flourish as you gather resources, chop trees, mine stones, and craft planks and bricks to expand your domain. Defend your tower and defeat monsters to earn more valuable coins. Once you've gathered enough resources, set sail to explore new islands and expand your empire even further! How many lands can you build in this thrilling adventure? How to play Build Land? Move: WASD or arrow keys Rotate camera: Q and E Who created Build Land? Build Land is created by Zupga. Play their other games on Poki: Cat Room Blast ! How can I play Build Land for free? You can play Build Land for free on Poki. Can I play Build Land on mobile devices and desktop? Build Land can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
